name: guru-sync-base
description: Resolve, review, safely synchronize, and validate the selected Git base before Guru Team reads repository task context or starts intake side effects.

entry_preconditions.evidence: tool-free workflow route or explicit standalone refresh/verify request
entry_preconditions.binding: repo-changing workflow invocation or explicit standalone base operation
entry_preconditions.freshness: reviewed for this invocation before any repository or network semantic read

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, managed package inventory and runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated by run-skill-command before each command

entry_preconditions.evidence: Git toplevel, current branch and HEAD
entry_preconditions.binding: the repository and checkout whose base freshness gates this invocation

entry_preconditions.evidence: canonical resolve-only JSON bytes/file and expected resolution_sha256
entry_preconditions.binding: explicit, config-single, remote-default or unique-fallback source identity reused by sync-base and prepare-task
entry_preconditions.freshness: raw bytes, digest and source-preserving identity recomputation match before initial reads and independently before each GitHub/worktree/task mutation

entry_preconditions.evidence: NUL-safe Git status before and after synchronization
entry_preconditions.binding: decision checkout has no tracked, untracked or staged changes
entry_preconditions.freshness: checked before fetch, before fast-forward and after synchronization

entry_preconditions.evidence: guru-base-sync-result-1.0 JSON, facts_sha256 and live Git facts
entry_preconditions.binding: decision checkout, local base and remote-tracking base identity
entry_preconditions.freshness: objective validator matches current clean Git state

validators.objective_scope: strict four-level resolution, canonical resolution digest binding, explicit refspec fetch, selected-checkout ff-only execution and three-way equality facts
evidence boundary, Draft 2020-12 schema, facts digest, selected refs, clean checkout and live decision/local/remote HEAD equality

external_exits.evidence: AI-reviewed and validator-passed fresh base sync result
AI-reviewed non-repo route plus stdout-only skipped recorder facts
resolution, Git, AI review or objective validation failure

reentry.identity: invocation intent, repository identity, decision checkout, resolution source/base/remote/candidates, raw bytes and resolution_sha256
reentry.freshness: resolution recomputes identically and result still matches clean live Git facts
